item.name: Coral Seadragon
item.description:
Dedicates its life to lookingâ”€and behavingâ”€as much like coral as possible.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Its cunning disguise as a piece of inanimate coral is perfectly complemented by its natural tendency to remain perfectly still unless absolutely necessary. This is, however, credited to sheer laziness rather than an innate desire to survive.
